mapper.select:
SELECT r.id, r.name, r.student_id, r.phone, r.email, r.status, r.register_date, r.create_time, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow b WHERE b.reader_id = r.id AND b.status IN ('BORROWED','OVERDUE')) AS active_borrow_count FROM reader r
AND (r.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR r.student_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR r.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY r.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reader (name, student_id, phone, email, status, register_date) VALUES (#{name}, #{studentId}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{status}, #{registerDate})
